display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
No ready endpoints:
fix Service selector OR add a readinessProbe
this is the usual 503 cause

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Upstream timeout / app erroring:
check pod logs + the controller timeout annotations

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Host/path rule miss:
check Ingress host + path + pathType,
and ingressClassName matches the controller

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Upstream protocol/port mismatch:
Service targetPort wrong, or app speaks https/h2c
and the controller expects http

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Secret missing/expired, wrong namespace,
or SNI host mismatch — check the tls secretName
